extractMetadata.notes: TMT tracks BN-level tasks, suspenses, and action items across all S-sections. Tasks are assigned by higher headquarters (Demo Battalion, USASOC, SOCOM), CDR guidance, or internal staff coordination. Priority levels: IMMEDIATE (24h), URGENT (72h), ROUTINE (1-30 days).

tasks.title: Submit BN OER/NCOER Completion Report to Group S1
tasks.description: Compile and submit BN OER/NCOER completion rates for FY26 Q3 to Group S1. Include list of outstanding evals by section.
tasks.notes: Missing: Diallo NCOER (due Jul 2026 — not yet due), 2 ODA evals pending CDR signatures. Report will show 94% completion.

tasks.title: Process DD93/SGLV Updates — Garza, Ingram (overdue)
tasks.description: Update DD93 and SGLV8286 for SFC Garza (post-deployment 2024 beneficiary change) and MSG Ingram (PCS gap 2025). Counsel both soldiers and upload to iPERMS.
tasks.notes: Garza scheduled 20 Jun — needs spouse beneficiary data. Ingram on leave until 22 Jun — schedule 24 Jun.

tasks.title: New Gain In-Processing — SGT Bynum, PFC Staton
tasks.description: Complete 30-day in-processing checklist for both new gains. Required: DD93, SGLV, ID cards, access, medical SRP, AFT/CFT test, weapon qualification, CAC, NIPR account, DTMS enrollment.
tasks.notes: Bynum: 60% complete — DD93/SGLV pending. Staton: 20% complete — arrived late; priority items 1st week.

tasks.title: DISS PRR Submission — Delgado (CRITICALLY OVERDUE — 27 months)
tasks.description: Initiate and submit Tier 5 PR package for SFC Delgado (EDIPI 5051005002). PRR 27 months overdue. CAF waiver expires 01 Sep 2026 — access MUST be suspended if not submitted. Coordinate with DCSA portal.
tasks.notes: CRITICAL — CDR informed. Delgado's Tier 5 PR requires full scope poly — schedule with DIA CAF through SOCOM channels. Deadline: 30 Jun 2026 hard.

tasks.title: DISS Insider Threat SAR — Richardson case resolution
tasks.description: Monitor CAF review of SSG Richardson's SOCRATES access incident (Oct 2025). Coordinate with DIA CAF for disposition. Maintain access restriction until written CAF authorization received.
tasks.notes: SAR submitted Nov 2025. CAF review ongoing. Expected disposition Q3 2026. Richardson access restricted to non-SOCRATES material. Brief CDR monthly.

tasks.title: STEPP Non-Compliance — Kowalczyk (ALL training expired)
tasks.description: CPT Kowalczyk — all 4 annual STEPP courses expired Mar 2026 (TDY excuse documented). Must complete ASRT, Derivative Classification, Insider Threat, and CIAR by 18 Jul 2026 or access review triggered.
tasks.notes: TDY excuse on file. Kowalczyk notified 18 Jun. Must self-schedule via STEPP portal. Confirm completion to S2 NLT 18 Jul 2026.

tasks.title: Operations Order (OPORD) — Demo Battalion Exercise IRON ARROW
tasks.description: Develop and publish 2-5 SFG OPORD for Exercise IRON ARROW (FTX — Aug 2026). Coordinate with Alpha Co, Bravo Co, and S4 for logistics annex. Submit to Group S3 NLT 25 Jun.
tasks.notes: OPORD draft complete — awaiting CDR review. S4 logistics annex 90% — Morrison coordinating. Submit to Group NLT 25 Jun.

tasks.title: AFT/CFT Retake Admin — Peters and Nguyen (second failure)
tasks.description: SSG Peters and SPC Nguyen failed CFT second attempt (17 Jun 2026). Per CDR policy: 2nd failure initiates admin action. Coordinate with S1 for counseling. Test window 15 Jul 2026. If third failure — initiation of separation action IAW AR 600-9.
tasks.notes: Both soldiers counseled 18 Jun. Peters — ruck failure (78:12 vs 72:00 standard). Nguyen — combat water survival. PT plan required. Coordinate with SFC Warren.

tasks.title: Group SITREP — Monthly BN Readiness Report (Jun 2026)
tasks.description: Monthly SITREP to Demo Battalion HQ. Include: personnel readiness, AFT/CFT data, medical readiness, equipment status, training completion rates, flagging actions.
tasks.notes: Data collection 70% complete. S1 (personnel data), S4 (equipment), and S6 (cyber/AUP) inputs pending. Perkins to consolidate by 22 Jun.

tasks.title: Class IX Requisition — M249 Spare Barrel (critical shortage)
tasks.description: Expedite requisition for 4× M249 spare barrels (NSN 1005-01-631-1209). Critical shortage identified during ODA-5213 live fire — 2 of 6 barrels unserviceable. Requisition via GCSS-Army urgent. POC: SFC Graves (S4/Maintenance).
tasks.notes: Requisition submitted to GCSS-Army 02 May — Priority 1 (Immediate). EDD: 30 Jun 2026. Follow up weekly with supply OIC. Temp fix: borrowed 2 barrels from Bravo Co — must return by 01 Jul.

tasks.title: Hand Receipt Inventory — Annual Equipment Verification (S4)
tasks.description: Annual 100% hand receipt inventory verification for BN primary hand receipt. All sub-hand receipt holders must sign documentation. GCSS-Army data must match physical inventory.
tasks.notes: Alpha Co and BN Staff started. Bravo Co, Charlie Co, Support Co scheduled Jun-Jul. Flag discrepancies immediately. SGT Watts sub-hand receipt not signed — priority.

tasks.title: DTS Travel Voucher — O'Brien (TDY Apr 2026 — voucher overdue)
tasks.description: SGT O'Brien TDY voucher (Apr 2026 network TDY) not submitted — 60+ days overdue. Potential debt collection if not resolved. O'Brien NIPR account suspended (AUP) — coordinate through S8 and S6.
tasks.notes: S6 and S8 coordination required. O'Brien AUP suspended — cannot access DTS. Submit paper voucher to S8 or restore NIPR access first. Navarro tracking. O'Brien counseled.

tasks.title: JKO Compliance Report — BN AUP/Cyber completion (S6)
tasks.description: Compile and submit BN JKO cyber awareness and AUP completion report for Group S6. Identify non-compliant soldiers and status of account suspensions.
tasks.notes: O'Brien — AUP expired (Suspended). Moore — AUP 30-day warning. 22 soldiers have JKO cyber annual expiring within 60 days. Report to Group S6 NLT 01 Jul.

tasks.title: Plans Annex — CENTCOM Campaign Update (S5/S9 Joint)
tasks.description: Update CENTCOM campaign plan annex (CA / FID focus) for Group staff. Include FHA project status, FID mission analysis, and civil affairs assessment. Submit to Group G9 and S3.
tasks.notes: Donovan and Okafor coordinating. Okafor returned from USSOCOM TDY with updated CENTCOM CA priorities. Annex draft expected 05 Jul.

tasks.title: Language Test (DLPT) — Garza, Diallo, Donovan scheduled
tasks.description: Schedule DLPT for SFC Garza (Spanish — recertification), SFC Diallo (Arabic — FLPP renewal), MAJ Donovan (Arabic — FLPP initial). Coordinate with Group Language NCO and DLI testing site.
tasks.notes: DLI testing window available Aug 2026 at Ft Bragg testing site. FLPP payment depends on passing DLPT at required level. Coordinate TDY orders through S8/DTS by 15 Jul.

tasks.title: FID Deployment Preparation — ODA-5211 / ODA-5212 (CENTCOM)
tasks.description: ODA-5211 and ODA-5212 deployment preparation — 01 Jul 2026 projected departure. Pre-deployment checklist: medical SRP, AFT, CFT, weapons qual, OPSEC brief, SGLV/DD93 current, DTS orders.
tasks.notes: Medical SRP complete for all 24 soldiers. AFT and CFT: all pass. Weapons qual: all qualified. SGLV/DD93: all current. DTS orders submitted — pending Group approval. OPSEC brief scheduled 20 Jun.

tasks.title: GCSS-Army Property Reconciliation — Class IX Shortage Items
tasks.description: Reconcile GCSS-Army Class IX records — identify outstanding requisitions, backorders, and items on excess. Update property book accordingly. Coordinate with DPW and Army Supply chain.
tasks.notes: 15 open requisitions. M249 barrel (priority), ANPVS-14 mount (3 on order), medical NSNs for 18D kit (18 items). Graves tracking weekly with Supply OIC.

tasks.title: MEB Coordination — Riley and Washington (WTU actions)
tasks.description: Coordinate WTU/MEB administrative actions for SFC Riley and SSG Washington. Ensure continuity of pay, SDAP suspension documentation, VA rating coordination, and iPERMS records current.
tasks.notes: Riley — PEB review ongoing at BAMC; next hearing scheduled Jul 2026. Washington — PEB submission pending final medical assessment. Both soldiers counseled monthly. Coordinate with Rear D and Group S1.

tasks.title: Finance Audit — GPC Expenditure Review Q2 FY2026
tasks.description: CDR quarterly GPC audit — review all Q2 FY26 expenditures against approved purpose codes. Verify documentation for all purchases. Submit signed audit memo to CDR NLT 30 Jun.
tasks.notes: 78 transactions reviewed — 75 compliant. 3 flagged for documentation gap: $142 (Kowalczyk — missing receipt), $380 (Morrison — split tender question), $1,240 (Simmons — misaligned purpose code). Resolving 20-25 Jun.

tasks.title: Network Hardware Upgrade — SIPR Terminal Replacement (S6)
tasks.description: Replace 8 aging SIPR terminals (3 BN Staff, 2 Alpha Co, 3 Support Co) with new DMCC-compliant terminals. Coordinate with NETCOM for imaging and accreditation. Schedule one section at a time to avoid SIPR downtime.
tasks.notes: Procurement through GCSS-Army. EDD: 15 Jul 2026 for hardware delivery. Installation TBD based on NETCOM scheduling.

tasks.title: Soldier Readiness Processing (SRP) — Pre-deployment ODA-5211/5212
tasks.description: Full SRP for all 24 deploying soldiers (ODA-5211 and ODA-5212). Medical: immunizations current, dental class 1/2, pharmacy review, hearing. Admin: DD93/SGLV/PRR, legal, finance, powers of attorney.
tasks.notes: COMPLETE — All 24 soldiers SRP complete. Medical: 100% MRC Class 1/2. All admin docs current. Cleared for deployment 01 Jul 2026.

tasks.title: Annual SHARP Training Report — Submit to Group Provost
tasks.description: Submit annual SHARP training completion report (307 soldiers) to Group Provost Marshal and G1. Include VT attendance records from JKO and in-person facilitator sign-in sheets.
tasks.notes: COMPLETE — Report submitted 28 Jan 2026. 100% completion rate. No incidents reported this cycle.

tasks.title: Weapons Qualification Retakes — 3 soldiers pending (from Feb 2026)
tasks.description: 3 soldiers who failed Feb 2026 M4A1 qual must re-qualify by 25 Jun 2026. Names: SGT Martinez (Alpha Co), SPC Kim (Bravo Co), SPC Thompson (Support Co). Range scheduled 25 Jun.
tasks.notes: Range time confirmed 25 Jun — Range 14. Notify unit S1 POCs. If fail retake, commander action required.

tasks.title: iPERMS Document Upload — Deployment Award Completions
tasks.description: Upload 12 completed DA638 award packages (from ODA-5211/5212 deployment cycle awards) to iPERMS. Ensure all supporting documents signed and in proper format per MILPER 25-001.
tasks.notes: 6 of 12 uploaded. Remaining 6 awaiting final Group CDR signature. Upload remaining within 5 days of receiving signed originals.

tasks.title: MEDPROS Audit — BN Dental and Immunization Review
tasks.description: Review MEDPROS dental class and immunization currency for all 307 soldiers. Identify all Class 3/4 dental and overdue immunizations. Coordinate SRP appointments for those with deficiencies.
tasks.notes: Initial audit: 8 soldiers dental Class 3 (schedule within 90 days), 4 soldiers overdue on flu/tetanus. SFC Moreno coordinating with Blanchfield dental.

tasks.title: BN Training Schedule — T-7 through T-1 (Jul–Aug 2026)
tasks.description: Publish BN training schedule for 1 Jul – 31 Aug 2026. Include AFT/CFT test windows, weapons qual, language training, mandatory training requirements, FID deployment impact on unit readiness.
tasks.notes: Draft submitted to CDR 15 Jun — CDR review Wed 18 Jun at 1300. Incorporate deconfliction with ODA-5211/5212 deployment. Final publication NLT 25 Jun.

tasks.title: Promotion Board Results — Publish and Update IPPS-A
tasks.description: 2-5 SFG AY26 SGT/SSG promotion board results expected from Group NLT 01 Jul 2026. Upon receipt: publish order, update IPPS-A, counsel selectees, order patches and new rank.
tasks.notes: Expect 8-12 E5 and E6 promotions this cycle. Pending Group board results.

tasks.title: EOY Training Assessment — FY26 DRRS-A Submission
tasks.description: Annual DRRS-A training assessment — compile FY26 training metrics, AFT/CFT pass rates, mandatory training completion, deployment readiness statistics, collective task assessments, and lesson learned.
tasks.notes: Begin data collection now. S7 to maintain running totals through Q4. Final compilation Sep 2026.

criticalItems: TMT-2601-004 — Delgado DISS PRR CRITICALLY OVERDUE (IMMEDIATE action required)
TMT-2601-008 — Peters/Nguyen CFT second failure — admin action initiated
